voices.name: Jamie Dimon

voices.name: Warren Buffett

news.title: The Lehman Bros. moment of the AI bubble is coming, says this critic warning of fallout for tech stocks and the entire market
news.summary: OpenAI is going down, and taking investors and an entire industry with it, argues artificial-intelligence critic Ed Zitron.

news.title: United earnings top estimates but airline expects $6 billion in added fuel costs

news.title: U.S. slaps 25% tariff on most Brazilian goods over 'unfair trade practices'
news.summary: A separate U.S. probe into forced-labor enforcement could see an additional 12.5% duty on Brazilian goods on top of the 25%, with the decision due next week.

news.title: GE boosts profit outlook, but stock falls as booming order growth cools
news.summary: GE Aerospace’s stock falls after earnings, again, with recently rapid order-book growth slowing.

news.title: FATF urges faster crypto AML enforcement as stablecoin crime increases
news.summary: The global task force said criminal networks are using stablecoins and developing proprietary tokens to evade asset freezes as countries struggle to enforce crypto AML rules.

news.title: AI is so big, it’s now impossible for investors to avoid
news.summary: Exposure to the artificial-intelligence boom has become virtually impossible for investors to avoid. The theme hasn’t just cornered the stock market. It has systematically swallowed up corporate credit and venture capital, too.
